rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT RE COMPLAINT DENIED. FAILURE TO SUSTAIN BURDEN. TRIABLE ISSUE AS TO DAMAGES. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT RE X-COMPLAINT DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF RE ATTORNEY MALPRACTICE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEFENDANT RAISES TRIABLE ISSUES AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT, FRAUD, BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING. BOTH MSA DENIED - IMPROPER NOTICE RE MSA. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: TOLBERTSON VS ASBESTOS CLAIMS MGMT CORP*
rulings.Rulings: DEFT GEORGIA PACIFIC MSJ - O/C PER MOVING PARTY. DEFT GOW SUPPLY MSJ - O/C DEFT DISMISSED. DEFT KELLY-MOORE MSJ - O/C PER MOVING PARTY. DEFT SAFEWAY INC. MSJ - O/C DEFT DISMISSED. DEFT METALCLAD MSJ - O/C DEFT DISMISSED. DEFT GRINNELL CORP. MSJ - O/C PER MOVING PARTY, DEFT WITHDRAWS MOTION. DEFT GOLDEN GATE DRYWALL - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. AS TO PLEA IN ABATEMENT - DENIED OTHER PLEADING SECTION DISMISSED. MOTION GRANTED NO TRIABLE ISSUE AS TO EXPOSURE TO GOLDEN GATE ASBESTOS PRODUCING ACTIVITIES. SEE DEFENDANT'S SEPARATELY STATED FACTS NUMBERS 9, 10, 11, 12. OBJECTION SUSTAINED TO GRAY DECLARATION - UNSIGNED. (CW)
